title: CT2.N13 completed discharge record — Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT2.N13, the assertion node “Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible” of tactic CT2 (Minimality and replacement). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT2.N13. It must be exactly `CT2`, selecting Minimality and replacement (minimality) as the tactic that owns the assertion step “Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible”. It must be exactly `CT2.N13` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT2.N13 within tactic CT2 (Minimality and replacement). It must be exactly 13, matching the N13 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT2.N13. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the assertion obligation “Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT2.N13. The array must contain `S-Prove`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Prove` to occur in CT2.N13's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence for the obligation “Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT2.N13 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Prove (proposition, assumptions, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Prove` evidence instance at CT2.N13. It must be exactly `S-Prove`, identifying the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence; the same instance must supply proposition, assumptions, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
